description:
Add fixture-matrix expect_clif_excludes assertions that lock in the typed cont seam.

Touch:
- fixtures/add1.fz: add
    # expect_clif_excludes: add1_s2: ishl_imm
    # expect_clif_excludes: add1_s2: bor_imm
    # expect_clif_excludes: k_2_s3: sshr_imm
  (Names may shift after .1 / .2; cross-check actual generated names via `fz dump --emit clif`.)
- fixtures/tail_recursion.fz: acceptance per docs/cps-in-clif.md §8.1 — count's recursive case has zero alloc; verify the *cont seam* is also clean (count's Term::Return ends in tail call without retag).
- fixtures/higher_order.fz: assertions per §8.2 — compose's cont (k_5_s15) captures typed where the typer narrowed (f's slot is ptr-typed, x's slot may stay Tagged or narrow).

Bless any new clif assertions via the matrix's BLESS=1 path.

Acceptance:
- cargo test --workspace green with new assertions enforced.
- fz dump --emit clif on the §8 fixtures matches the new shape.
title: fz-cps-narrow.3: CLIF-shape acceptance assertions
